Cses._comment: Service-account PHPSESSID used to scrape solved tasks. Do NOT commit a real value; set it via user-secrets or the Cses__SessionCookie environment variable.

Codeforces._comment: API key/secret for authorized methods (gym standings/problems). Do NOT commit real values; set via user-secrets or Codeforces__Key / Codeforces__Secret env vars.
